simple_types.name: DETECTMODE_DETECTMODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type DETECTMODE_DETECTMODE_Field is
   Default,
   LDETECT)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DIR_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type DIR_PIN0_Field is
   Input,
   Output)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DIRCLR_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type DIRCLR_PIN0_Field is
   Input,
   Output)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DIRCLR_PIN0_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type DIRCLR_PIN0_Field_1 is
   DIRCLR_PIN0_Field_Reset,
   Clear)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DIRCLR_PIN0_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Write: writing a '1' sets pin to input; writing a '0' has no effect

simple_types.name: DIRSET_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type DIRSET_PIN0_Field is
   Input,
   Output)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DIRSET_PIN0_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type DIRSET_PIN0_Field_1 is
   DIRSET_PIN0_Field_Reset,
   Set)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DIRSET_PIN0_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Write: writing a '1' sets pin to output; writing a '0' has no effect

simple_types.name: IN_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type IN_PIN0_Field is
   Low,
   High)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: LATCH_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type LATCH_PIN0_Field is
   NotLatched,
   Latched)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: OUT_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type OUT_PIN0_Field is
   Low,
   High)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: OUTCLR_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type OUTCLR_PIN0_Field is
   Low,
   High)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: OUTCLR_PIN0_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type OUTCLR_PIN0_Field_1 is
   OUTCLR_PIN0_Field_Reset,
   Clear)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: OUTCLR_PIN0_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Write: writing a '1' sets the pin low; writing a '0' has no effect

simple_types.name: OUTSET_PIN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type OUTSET_PIN0_Field is
   Low,
   High)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: OUTSET_PIN0_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type OUTSET_PIN0_Field_1 is
   OUTSET_PIN0_Field_Reset,
   Set)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: OUTSET_PIN0_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Write: writing a '1' sets the pin high; writing a '0' has no effect

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_CTRLSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_CTRLSEL_Field is
   GPIO,
   VPR,
   GRTC)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_DIR_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_DIR_Field is
   Input,
   Output)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Input
enumeration_literals.description: Configure pin as an output pin

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_DRIVE0_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_DRIVE0_Field is
   S0,
   H0,
   D0,
   E0)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_DRIVE1_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_DRIVE1_Field is
   S1,
   H1,
   D1,
   E1)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_INPUT_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_INPUT_Field is
   Connect,
   Disconnect)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_PULL_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_PULL_Field is
   Disabled,
   Pulldown,
   Pullup)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: PIN_CNF_SENSE_Field
simple_types.code:
type PIN_CNF_SENSE_Field is
   Disabled,
   High,
   Low)
  with Size => 2;

array_types.name: DIR_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DIR_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of DIR_PIN0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: DIRCLR_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DIRCLR_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of DIRCLR_PIN0_Field_1
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: DIRSET_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DIRSET_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of DIRSET_PIN0_Field_1
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: IN_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type IN_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of IN_PIN0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: LATCH_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type LATCH_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of LATCH_PIN0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: OUT_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type OUT_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of OUT_PIN0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: OUTCLR_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type OUTCLR_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of OUTCLR_PIN0_Field_1
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

array_types.name: OUTSET_PIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type OUTSET_PIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 31) of OUTSET_PIN0_Field_1
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 32;

variables.name: GLOBAL_P0_NS_Periph
variables.code:
GLOBAL_P0_NS_Periph : aliased GPIO_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GLOBAL_P0_NS_Base;
